features.name: Innate Sorcery
features.description: As a Bonus Action, you can unleash the magic within you for 1 minute. During this time, your Sorcerer spell save DC increases by 1, and you have Advantage on attack rolls for Sorcerer spells you cast. You can use this feature twice per Long Rest.

features.name: Spellcasting
features.description: You prepare a fixed number of spells from the Sorcerer spell list (starting with 4 at level 1). Charisma is your spellcasting ability.

features.name: Font of Magic
features.description: You can tap into a wellspring of magic within yourself, represented by Sorcery Points. You can use these points to create additional spell slots or convert spell slots into points.

features.name: Metamagic
features.description: You gain two Metamagic options of your choice. You can use these to augment your spells (e.g., Careful Spell, Quickened Spell).

features.name: Sorcerer Subclass
features.description: You choose your subclass (Sorcerous Origin). You gain features from this subclass at levels 3, 6, 14, and 18.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: You can increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1, or take a feat.

features.name: Sorcerous Restoration
features.description: When you finish a Short Rest, you can regain expended Sorcery Points equal to half your Sorcerer level (rounded down).

features.name: Subclass Feature
features.description: You gain a feature from your chosen subclass.

features.name: Sorcery Incarnate
features.description: While your Innate Sorcery feature is active, you can use up to two Metamagic options on a single spell.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: You can increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1, or take a feat.

features.name: Metamagic
features.description: You gain an additional Metamagic option.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: You can increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1, or take a feat.

features.name: Subclass Feature
features.description: You gain a feature from your chosen subclass.

features.name: Ability Score Improvement
features.description: You can increase one ability score by 2, or two scores by 1, or take a feat.

features.name: Metamagic
features.description: You gain an additional Metamagic option.

features.name: Subclass Feature
features.description: You gain a feature from your chosen subclass.

features.name: Epic Boon
features.description: You gain an Epic Boon feat of your choice.

features.name: Arcane Apotheosis
features.description: While your Innate Sorcery is active, you can use one Metamagic option on each of your spells without spending Sorcery Points.
